top_signals.title: Pakistan Outlines 4% Growth Target For Next Fiscal Year
top_signals.summary: Pakistan aims to grow at a slightly faster pace in the financial year starting July even as the crude price shock from the Middle East war clouds the outlook for the nation, which continues to rely on support from the International Monetary Fund.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Live markets: Bitcoin retreats under $72,000 as Strategy unloads BTC for first time in four years
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Logistics M&A accelerates as WWEX and Auctane form ShipStation Global
top_signals.summary:
WWEX and Auctane form ShipStation Global to give small and midsize shippers enterprise-grade technology and transportation services through a single platform.

The post Logistics M&A accelerates as WWEX and Auctane form ShipStation Global appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Sushi chain in Japan may consult police over video of man pouring liquid on sushi
top_signals.summary: The video, posted on TikTok on Wednesday, seems to show the uploader pouring liquid from a dish soap bottle onto sushi that had been delivered to him via a conveyor belt.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Wu-Tang Clan’s final tour stop highlights enduring Asian influences
top_signals.summary: Wu-Tang Clan built its mythology on martial arts films and Asian iconography — and Yokohama finally got to witness that legacy live on the group's farewell tour.

top_signals.title: Microsoft investigates Office Apps, Teams file access issues
top_signals.summary: Microsoft says an ongoing incident is preventing users of its Teams collaboration platform and free Office for the web cloud-based productivity suite from opening files. [...]
